OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-20-2018 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg

Defendants Julie Lee And 626 Jackson Street Llc'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Plaintiff'S Complaint
Off Calendar Jun-14-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
William Weisber, (415)296-7070 for Plaintiff/Opposing party The Great Star Theater, Inc.
Stanley Shen, (415)661-6700 for Defendants/Opposing parties Julie Lee and 626 jackson Street LLC.

Not argued; both sides submit to the tenative ruling. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS JULIE LEE, 626 JACKSON STREET, LLC'S Motion To Dismiss Plaintiff's Complaint is DENIED. Plaintiff's corporate status is active. Order signed in Open Court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Defendants Julie Lee And 626 Jackson Street Llc'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Jun-14-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
William Weisber, (415)296-7070 for Plaintiff/Opposing party The Great Star Theater, Inc.
Stanley Shen, (415)661-6700 for Defendants/Opposing parties Julie Lee and 626 jackson Street LLC.

Argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS 626 JACKSON STREET, LLC, JULIE LEE'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is DENIED in part and GRANTED in part. The motion is DENIED as to the contract causes of action and GRANTED with leave to amend as to the tort causes of action to address Paul Nathan's assignment of rights. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-01-2018 Set For Trial On Sep-24-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-27-2017 Continued To Feb-14-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-16-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF THE GREAT STAR THEATER, INC'S DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT, as to the answer of defendants Julie Lee and 626 Jackson Street LLC is SUSTAINED with twenty days leave to amend. Defendants' request to file an amended answer is granted. The prevailing party shall submit a [proposed] written order that tracks the Court's ruling, verbatim.

Judge: Harold Kahn: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Laura Reding, CSR No. 9711, e-mail: lreding@sftc.org. (L&M302)
